hero.subtitle: For over 40 years, Talaat Moustafa Group has been transforming Egypt's urban landscape with iconic mega-projects that redefine modern living.

about.title: A Legacy of Building Dreams
about.description: Talaat Moustafa Group (TMG) is one of Egypt's largest real estate developers, with a proven track record of delivering world-class integrated communities. From the iconic Madinaty to the coastal beauty of SouthMED, we build more than homes — we build futures.
about.v3_desc: Trusted by over a million families

projects.title: Landmarks That Define Egypt
projects.madinaty_desc: A fully integrated smart city east of Cairo, spanning over 8,000 acres with world-class residential, commercial, and recreational facilities.
projects.southmed_desc: Egypt's premier Mediterranean coastal resort community on the North Coast, featuring luxury villas and breathtaking sea views.

careers.title: Shape the Future With Us
careers.subtitle: Be part of Egypt's most ambitious real estate group. We're looking for talented individuals who share our vision of excellence.
careers.search_placeholder: Search by job title or department...
careers.no_jobs: No jobs found matching your criteria.

footer.description: Egypt's leading real estate developer, building iconic communities since 1982.
footer.address: Madinaty Offices, New Cairo, Cairo Governorate, Egypt
